_description: Published pharmacogenomics clinical case reports from peer-reviewed literature. Used for validating Anukriti phenotype predictions against real-world adverse drug reactions.

cases.clinical_outcome: Life-threatening opioid intoxication; morphine blood level 80 ug/L (expected 1-4 ug/L)
cases.patient_summary: 62-year-old male with CLL and bilateral pneumonia
cases.reference: Gasche Y et al. N Engl J Med. 2004;351(27):2827-2831

cases.clinical_outcome: Simultaneous two-vessel subacute stent thrombosis despite dual antiplatelet therapy
cases.reference: Kang YR, Hwang IC. Int J Cardiol. 2016;220:520-522

cases.clinical_outcome: Stent thrombosis in patients on standard clopidogrel therapy
cases.patient_summary: Case series of patients with coronary stent thrombosis
cases.reference: Fernando H et al. Heart Lung Circ. 2011;20(4):260-263

cases.clinical_outcome: Three hemorrhagic events and four vitamin K treatments in <2 weeks on 2 mg/day; stabilized on 0.5 mg/day
cases.patient_summary: 74-year-old female with atrial fibrillation; also VKORC1 -1639 AA
cases.reference: Johnson JA, Cavallari LH. Case Rep Genet. 2014;2014:413743

cases.clinical_outcome: Severe warfarin sensitivity requiring 0.5 mg/day (typical: 5 mg/day)
cases.patient_summary: Same patient as PUB-004; compound CYP2C9 *3/*3 + VKORC1 AA
cases.reference: Johnson JA, Cavallari LH. Case Rep Genet. 2014;2014:413743

cases.clinical_outcome: Fatal toxicity: thrombocytopenia, diarrhea, renal failure, hypovolemic shock
cases.patient_summary: Cancer patient; complete DPD deficiency discovered post-mortem
cases.reference: Fidai SS et al. Autops Case Rep. 2019;9(3):e2019091

cases.clinical_outcome: Severe 5-FU toxicity after single cycle of FOLFIRINOX
cases.reference: Hamzic S et al. J Med Case Rep. 2019;13:89

cases.clinical_outcome: Severe pancytopenia 3 weeks after starting azathioprine; required G-CSF and transfusions
cases.reference: Loit E et al. Nat Rev Nephrol. 2011;7:478

cases.clinical_outcome: Developing myelosuppression; near-miss prevented by TPMT testing
cases.patient_summary: 19-year-old male; TPMT enzyme activity 0.9 IU/mL RBC
cases.reference: Coulthard SA et al. Mult Scler. 2006;12(6):828-831

cases.clinical_outcome: Grade 4 neutropenia, grade 3 diarrhea after first cycle; required two dose reductions
cases.patient_summary: Metastatic colorectal cancer patient on FOLFIRI
cases.reference: Minami H et al. Jpn J Clin Oncol. 2013;43(8):841-845

cases.clinical_outcome: Myopathy; OR 16.9 for CC vs TT genotype in SEARCH trial (n=12,000)
cases.patient_summary: SEARCH trial cohort: 85 myopathy cases on simvastatin 80 mg
cases.reference: SEARCH Collaborative Group. N Engl J Med. 2008;359(8):789-799

cases.clinical_outcome: Progressive myalgia advancing to rhabdomyolysis after 10 years on simvastatin
cases.patient_summary: 69-year-old male on simvastatin 40 mg with co-administered supplements
cases.reference: Ramsey LB et al. Clin Pharmacol Ther. 2019

cases.clinical_outcome: Therapeutic failure; inadequate pain relief due to inability to form O-desmethyltramadol
cases.patient_summary: Chronic pain patient; dual CYP2D6/CYP2C19 poor metabolizer
cases.reference: Shaikh A, Patri M. Henry Ford Health Scholarly Commons. 2019
